title: The International Development Association (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1960
full_text: The International Development Association (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1960 अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय विकास संगम (प्रास्‍थिति, उन्‍मुक्‍ति तथा विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1960 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196032 Act Number: 32 Enactment Date: 1960-09-09 Act Year: 1960 Short Title: The International Development Association (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1960 Hindi Title: अन्‍तरराष्‍ट्रीय विकास संगम (प्रास्‍थिति, उन्‍मुक्‍ति तथा विशेषाधिकार) अधिनियम, 1960 Long Title: An Act to implement the international agreement for the establishment and operation of the International Development Association in so far as it relates to the status, immunities and privileges of that Association, and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Economic Affairs Enforcement Date: 15-10-1960 Notification: 15th October, 1960, vide notification No. S.O. 2474A, dated 11th October, 1960, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Last Updated: 01-04-2019 Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The International Development Association (Status, Immunities and Privileges) Act, 1960 Show all section Section 1. Short title, extent and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Conferment of status and certain immunities and privileges on the Association and conferment of certain immunities and privileges on its officers and employees. Section 4. Power to make rules. Section 5. Notifications under section 3 and rules under section 4 to be placed before Parliament. Schedule 1.
